title: Termite Treatment in Union, NJ | $800–$4,000

Our licensed technicians use advanced detection methods and proven treatment solutions to eliminate termite colonies and protect your property.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Union typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand all costs upfront.

faqs.question: What termite treatment methods do you use in Union?
faqs.answer: We offer liquid termiticide barrier treatments, termite baiting systems, and localized spot treatments depending on your property's needs. Our technicians assess your specific situation during the inspection and recommend the most effective solution for long-term termite elimination and prevention.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Union homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Union are completed in 4-8 hours for an average-sized home. The timeline depends on your property size, treatment method, and severity of infestation. We work efficiently to minimize disruption while ensuring thorough application and protection.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite treatment warranties in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive warranties on our termite treatments in Union, typically ranging from 1 to 5 years depending on the treatment type. Our warranty includes annual inspections and retreatment if termites return during the coverage period, giving you long-term protection and peace of mind.
